body:
## Rationale

Proven GA4 format (Igor Cavalera lick pages = 2 of top-10 GA4 pages; 9 views each last 7 days). All three drummers are on the 62-drummer roster and absent from ALL prior lick batches 1–7 (confirmed). Together they cover the progressive metal audience: Portnoy (Dream Theater), Halpern (Periphery), Lopez (Opeth).

**Dedup confirmed:** Searched all 100 open seo-proposals (#2148–#2433) for 'lick pages batch 8' — not found. All three drummers verified absent from batches 1–7 (batch 7 = Jay Weinberg + Nicko McBrain + Pete Sandoval, #2433; batch 6 = Eloy Casagrande + George Kollias + Paul Mazurkiewicz, #2424).

## Lick pages (3 per drummer, 9 total)

### Mike Portnoy (Dream Theater) — `/drummers/mike-portnoy/licks/`
1. **`mike-portnoy-pull-me-under-fill`** — The iconic fill/crash pattern from 'Pull Me Under' (Images & Words, 1992). Quintessential progressive metal intro fill. Tutorial angle: displacement rhythm at 3/4 against 4/4 feel.
2. **`mike-portnoy-in-the-presence-of-enemies-blast`** — The blast/polyrhythm passage from 'In the Presence of Enemies' (Systematic Chaos, 2007). Complex metric modulation.
3. **`mike-portnoy-the-dance-of-eternity-meter-change`** — The meter-change sequence from 'The Dance of Eternity' (Metropolis Pt. 2, 1999). Famous for 108 time signature changes — AI-citation anchor.

### Matt Halpern (Periphery) — `/drummers/matt-halpern/licks/`
4. **`matt-halpern-scarlet-groove`** — The Periphery 'Scarlet' syncopated groove pattern. Djent ghost-note integration.
5. **`matt-halpern-ragnarok-blast`** — The blast variation from 'Ragnarok' (Periphery II, 2012). Hybrid blast/groove djent application.
6. **`matt-halpern-masamune-ghost-notes`** — The ghost-note density pattern from 'Masamune'. Modern djent technique breakdown.

### Martin Lopez (Opeth) — `/drummers/martin-lopez/licks/`
7. **`martin-lopez-demon-of-the-fall-opening`** — The acoustic-to-electric dynamic fill from 'Demon of the Fall' (My Arms, Your Hearse, 1998). Iconic Opeth technique.
8. **`martin-lopez-blackwater-park-shuffle`** — The jazz-influenced shuffle groove from 'Blackwater Park' title track. Rare jazz-metal application.
9. **`martin-lopez-deliverance-blast`** — The blast-beat section from 'Deliverance' (2002). Metal component of Opeth's dual-mode writing.

## Files to create
For each lick (×9):
- Entry in per-drummer lick module under `/packages/frontend/data/licks/[drummer-slug].js`
- HTML page auto-generated at `/drummers/[drummer-slug]/licks/[lick-slug]`

For each drummer (×3):
- `/public/llms/licks/[drummer-slug].md` — update/create LLM lick summary file
- Hub page auto-generated at `/drummers/[drummer-slug]/licks`

## Quality gate (per lick page)
- ≥200 words description + technique breakdown
- YouTube embed or notation diagram reference
- ≥3 internal links (drummer profile, album article, technique page)
- Difficulty rating + genre tag
- FAQ entry for AI Overview eligibility

## Estimated organic uplift
Targets: 'mike portnoy licks', 'dream theater drum patterns', 'matt halpern djent technique', 'periphery drum fills', 'martin lopez opeth drumming'. Proven format — Igor Cavalera lick pages drive consistent GA4 organic traffic. Progressive metal audience = high engagement + sharing behavior.

## Verify
1. All 9 lick slugs appear in per-drummer lick data modules
2. All 9 lick pages render at `/drummers/[slug]/licks/[lick-slug]` (200 OK)
3. All 3 hub pages render at `/drummers/[slug]/licks` (200 OK)
4. All 3 LLM files exist in `public/llms/licks/`
5. Sitemap includes all 9 individual lick pages + 3 hub pages

## Done
All 9 lick pages + 3 hub pages live with LLM companion files and sitemap entries.
title: SEO batch: Lick pages batch 8 — Mike Portnoy + Matt Halpern + Martin Lopez (~9 lick pages + 3 LLM files)
